PLAIN MEANING: 7-digit permanent ship ID. Never changes, even if renamed/reflagged.
FEEDS / LOGIC TRIGGER: The ONE key. Build once, reuse forever.
CTO NOTE: This is the primary key of the whole registry. A vessel is built ONCE against its IMO and reused — never rebuilt.

PLAIN MEANING: Cargo Ship or Bulk Carrier. Only two values.
FEEDS / LOGIC TRIGGER: Gates which cargoes can be offered.
CTO NOTE: Old data said 'General Cargo','MPP' etc. — all normalise to Cargo Ship. Deck/Gear/Features are separate optional attributes, NOT types.

PLAIN MEANING: Deadweight: max weight (cargo+fuel+stores) the ship can carry.
FEEDS / LOGIC TRIGGER: THE matching figure. Cargo qty vs DWT decides Strong/Good/Possible/Weak.
CTO NOTE: DWT IS the match number, full stop. Do not match on DWCC/grain/bale. Tolerance: within -5% Strong; below -5% Medium; over = reject. %-based, admin-set.
Some charterers reject >20-25yr ships. Future filter, not a hard gate now.
FOC (flag of convenience) is normal in this segment — note it, don't block on it. (Old FOC category field was killed.)

PLAIN MEANING: Gross tonnage: enclosed volume measure. NOT weight.
CTO NOTE: GRT ≠ DWT. GRT is a volume/registration figure; never use it for cargo matching.
A berth/port has a max LOA. Feeds future port-fit check.

PLAIN MEANING: How deep she sits loaded, metres.
CTO NOTE: If port max_draft < vessel draft, she can't enter fully laden — lightering needed. Feeds port-fit logic.
Merged old CLASS + CLASS_SOCIETY into one. No class = red flag.

PLAIN MEANING: What contract the ship currently trades under.
FEEDS / LOGIC TRIGGER: Disponent-owner risk; who can fix her.
TYPE & RULE: Enum: V/C / TCT / T/C short / T/C long / Bareboat
CTO NOTE: If T/C or Bareboat, the lister is a disponent operator, not the registered owner. Quiet verification note: confirm the charter is valid before fixing. NOT a user-facing banner.

PLAIN MEANING: Open / Fixed / On Subs / Ballast / Off-hire.
FEEDS / LOGIC TRIGGER: Is she available to offer right now.
CTO NOTE: 'Fixed' not 'Closed'. Maritime word, not SaaS.
Red Sea N & S are SEPARATE zones. Port Said=East Med, Aden=Arabian Sea.
Resolves to LOCODE. Never auto-create a port row from free text.
Format EGALY not 'EG ALY'.
Derived from LOCODE — don't hand-type.
Flags: red overdue / amber <=7d / green >7d. Mirrors cargo laycan.

PLAIN MEANING: Where she wants to go next (prompt/ballast pref).

CTO NOTE: One of the 5 fields a human must give if no Q88 pasted. Holds = hatches by default.
Defaults equal to NUM_HOLDS. Only set when genuinely different (some MPP/coasters).

FEEDS / LOGIC TRIGGER: Containers/steel/packaged stow cleanly in box holds.
CTO NOTE: Box-shaped = easier break-bulk stow. One of the 5 human fields.
One of the 5 human fields.

PLAIN MEANING: Tank-top strengthened for heavy cargo? Y/N.
CTO NOTE: If N, reject very dense cargo. One of the 5 human fields.

PLAIN MEANING: May alternate holds be left empty? Y/N.
CTO NOTE: Paired with STRENGTHENED_HEAVY.
One of the 5 human fields.

FEEDS / LOGIC TRIGGER: Can she self-load at a gearless port.
CTO NOTE: Already in DB — do not re-add. Geared reveals crane fields.
Only meaningful if IS_GEARED=Y.

PLAIN MEANING: Safe working load per crane, tonnes.
FEEDS / LOGIC TRIGGER: Heaviest piece the crane can lift.
CTO NOTE: Project cargo: crane SWL >= heaviest piece, else reject.
Already in DB.

FEEDS / LOGIC TRIGGER: Speed -> days at sea -> ETA & bunker burn.
CTO NOTE: WAS MISSING from old master. Without speed the whole voyage estimate is blind. The broker lives on this number.

PLAIN MEANING: Main-engine fuel burn per day at sea.
FEEDS / LOGIC TRIGGER: tonnes/day x days = main bunker cost.
CTO NOTE: WAS MISSING. This is the single biggest voyage cost. If you store a vessel without it, you cannot estimate a voyage — the platform's core promise breaks.
WAS MISSING.
WAS MISSING. Geared ships burn more aux when self-discharging.
ECA zones require low-sulphur. Wrong fuel = wrong cost + compliance breach.

FEEDS / LOGIC TRIGGER: Bunker stem need at open port.
CTO NOTE: Already in DB.
NEVER displayed/matched. Volume-check only.
NEVER displayed/matched. With stowage factor decides if a light cargo cubes-out before it weighs-out.
Explicitly NOT the matching figure (overrides old decision). Volume-check only. Never on a card.
Consolidated from legacy OWNER_COMPANY + new REG_OWNER_COMPANY. Links to COMPANIES tab by IMO.
Company IMO, not vessel IMO.

PLAIN MEANING: Ship/commercial manager = the contact that fixes the ship (the charterer).
FEEDS / LOGIC TRIGGER: The party Arab ShipBroker actually deals with.
CTO NOTE: Disponent owner folds into here. Owner != manager is NORMAL — show both, no banner.
INFO ONLY — quiet/secondary. Never matches, never posts, never the contact.

PLAIN MEANING: Office address of the contact party.
CTO NOTE: PII. Default attached to commercial manager. Arab ShipBroker sits in the middle — never surfaced.
Never shown to other users, ever.
Separate field — this is the desk that actually does business.
Public-ish; helps verify the company is real.

PLAIN MEANING: Has Arab ShipBroker confirmed this record?
CTO NOTE: New user-added record is usable immediately but flagged Unverified until ASB confirms. Maps to is_verified.
e.g. Intelligence Register, Equasis, owner direct.
Broker eyes only. Old Scope/Risk-level structured fields were killed — this stays as free notes.
